caption: A video shows a man in a navy blue t-shirt speaking, appearing in a small inset window in the lower corner of the screen. In the background of his inset, a Christmas tree and a monitor displaying a logo are visible. The main screen transitions through various digital animations. Initially, a grey object with a logo is centered against a blue and green gradient background. This object then erupts into bright yellow and green flames. The scene then shifts to a dark purple background with the text "SMALL PRESENT" appearing in white. Finally, the screen displays a dynamic red and black radial burst pattern, with a stylized grey and black graphic and small white text at the bottom that includes "DISMISS ALL" and "BACK". Throughout the clip, the man remains in his inset window, continuing to speak and gesture.
